case_title: ADALICIA ROMERO PONCE VS. MARIA DE LOS ANGELES LEMUS RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY ROMERO PONCE, ADALICIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEMUS RODRIGUEZ, MARIA DE LOS ANGELES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ADALICIA ROMERO PONCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA DE LOS ANGELES LEMUS RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER ADALICIA ROMERO PONCE. JURIDICTION TO AWARD ATTORNEY FEES IS WITH THE CIVIL HARASSMENT COURT, NOT SMALL CLAIMS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
